text:
LONG NAME: IMGRTN_STUS_5YR_BAR_END_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) 

COMMENT: Section 403 of the Personal Responsibility and Work Opportunity Reconciliation Act of 1996 
(PRWORA) provides that certain immigrants who enter the United States on or after August 22, 1996, 
are not eligible to receive federally funded benefits, including Medicaid and the State Children’s 
Health
